texto: Your language looks like a treasure map,' she said, 'if you forget all the rest of the letters and focus in on the x, it looks as if you could find out where the treasure is.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kirmen Uribe: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Your language looks like a treasure map,' she said, 'if you forget all the rest of the letters an…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, basque, language pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de language.

frase_original: Your language looks like a treasure map,' she said, 'if you forget all the rest of the letters and focus in on the x, it looks as if you could find out where the treasure is.
